## BrowseTools.useBrowseDetailState() function

Hook for managing browse/detail view state.

Provides a consistent pattern for tools that have a list view (browse) and a detail view for individual items.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function useBrowseDetailState<TId extends string>(): IUseBrowseDetailStateResult<TId>;
```
**Returns:**

[IUseBrowseDetailStateResult](./ts-chocolate-ui.iusebrowsedetailstateresult.md)<!-- -->&lt;TId&gt;

Object containing state and actions for browse/detail navigation

## Example


```tsx
function MyTool() {
  const { state, actions } = useBrowseDetailState<ItemId>();

  if (state.viewMode === 'detail' && state.selectedId) {
    return <DetailView id={state.selectedId} onBack={actions.back} />;
  }
  return <BrowseView onSelect={actions.select} />;
}
```
